Hilaire V.
  • in: Gruer P., Hilaire V., Koukam A. and Rovarini P.
    "Heterogeneous formal specification based on Object-Z and statecharts: semantics and verification" (2004)

    "A formal framework for multi-agent systems analysis and design" (2002)
  • in: Gruer P., Hilaire V. and Koukam A.
    "Verification of Object-Z Specifications by Using Transition Systems: Application to the Radiomobile Network Design Problem" (2000)
  • in: Hilaire V., Koukam A., Gruer P. and Müller J.P.
    "Formal Specification and Prototyping of Multi-agent Systems" (2001)
  • in: Hilaire V., Koukam A., Gruer P. and Müller J.P.
    "Vers une méthodologie formelle de spécification de Systèmes Multi-Agents" (2001)

    "A Multiview Approach to Modeling and Analysis of Discrete Event Systems" (2003)
